signal.description: Tier-1 supplier cut full-year revenue guidance by 12% citing weaker orders from its two largest customers.

judgment.assessment: A 12% guidance cut concentrated in two customers suggests demand softening upstream, not a supplier-specific issue, and likely reads through to the customers' own quarters.

action.directive: RECONSIDER near-term demand assumptions for the two named customers before the next allocation review.

falsifier.condition: Either named customer reaffirms or raises its own revenue guidance within 30 days, or attributes the supplier's cut to a one-off inventory correction above 8%.
